finding: After submitting the application the only confirmation is a small line of green text beside the button; the form does not clear, disable, or redirect, so a non-technical user cannot tell the submission succeeded and will resubmit.

evidence.quote: Thanks. We received your details and will follow up shortly.

suggested_fix.current: Small inline green text 'Thanks. We received your details and will follow up shortly.' next to the SUBMIT button; form stays filled, no redirect
suggested_fix.proposed: On success, redirect to the existing /thank-you-for-applying page (or show a full-width banner above the form), and clear/disable the form

finding: The Blog/News CMS has no entry in the studio sidebar; the entire content type is only reachable by typing /admin/news.

evidence.quote: navigation "Admin sections": link "SEO pages : SEO page content" ... link "Media library : Images and source assets"

suggested_fix.current: Sidebar 'Admin sections' = SEO pages, Media library only
suggested_fix.proposed: Add a 'Blog & News' link (→ /admin/news) to the studio sidebar 'Admin sections' nav

finding: No phone number or email address anywhere on the homepage or in the footer — every contact path routes into a web form, leaving a frustrated user with no way to reach a human.

evidence.quote:
HOME
ABOUT
RESOURCES
CASE STUDIES
NEWS
CONTACT US
TERMS
PRIVACY POLICY

suggested_fix.current: Footer and site offer only nav links and a contact form; no phone/email
suggested_fix.proposed: Add a visible support email (e.g. support@vendingpreneurs.com) and/or phone number to the footer and contact page, plus a stated response time

finding: Homepage testimonial videos create possible keyboard focus traps with no visible focus indicator. Each of the four testimonial videos produces a tab stop with 'no visible focus indicator' and a 'possible focus trap' is flagged at the last stop of each video group.

evidence.quote: possible focus trap around stop 11 on video 'Video testimonial from Thomas Rohlader'
stop 10 (video 'Video testimonial from Thomas Rohlader'): no visible focus indicator

suggested_fix.current: Custom video players with no managed focus and no visible focus ring
suggested_fix.proposed: Ensure each video control is reachable and escapable by keyboard (no trap), and add a visible :focus-visible outline (e.g. 2px solid high-contrast ring) on the player and its controls

finding: The three hero proof-statistics render as literal zeros — '0+' entrepreneurs launched, '$0M+' sales, '0+' vending locations — so the site's headline social proof communicates that nothing has happened.

evidence.quote:
0+
ENTREPRENEURS LAUNCHED
$0M+
SNACK/DRINK SALES IN VENDINGPRENEUR MACHINES
0+
VENDING LOCATIONS W/OUR GUIDANCE
stat block shows 0+ and $0M+

suggested_fix.current: 0+ Entrepreneurs launched / $0M+ Snack-drink sales / 0+ Vending locations
suggested_fix.proposed: Populate real verified figures (e.g. '600+ entrepreneurs launched', '$12M+ in machine sales', '2,000+ locations'); if the count-up animation is failing, render the final value server-side as a fallback so it never shows 0

finding: Three required fields are commitments I may not have made yet: Business stage, Available startup budget, and Launch timeline are all required

evidence.quote:
Business stage*
(required)

Available startup budget*
(required)

Launch timeline*
(required)

suggested_fix.current: Business stage, budget, and timeline marked '(required)'
suggested_fix.proposed: Make only Name + Email required; mark stage/budget/timeline optional with a 'Not sure yet' option in each dropdown

finding: Homepage stat counters render as '0+', '$0M+', '0+' — to a cold visitor with no context this reads as a fake, brand-new, or broken site, destroying trust before they read the testimonials below.

evidence.quote: stat row shows 0+ / $0M+ / 0+

0+
ENTREPRENEURS LAUNCHED
$0M+
SNACK/DRINK SALES IN VENDINGPRENEUR MACHINES
0+
VENDING LOCATIONS W/OUR GUIDANCE

suggested_fix.current: Counters animating from/stuck at 0 with no real values (0+, $0M+, 0+)
suggested_fix.proposed: Render real seeded values (e.g. '500+', '$10M+', '1,200+') server-side so they never display as zero, even before any count-up animation runs

finding: The headline stat block renders literal zeros: "0+ ENTREPRENEURS LAUNCHED", "$0M+ SNACK/DRINK SALES IN VENDINGPRENEUR MACHINES", "0+ VENDING LOCATIONS W/OUR GUIDANCE". To a no-nonsense reader this says the program has launched zero people and done zero sales.

evidence.quote:
0+
ENTREPRENEURS LAUNCHED
$0M+
SNACK/DRINK SALES IN VENDINGPRENEUR MACHINES
0+
VENDING LOCATIONS W/OUR GUIDANCE
0+ / $0M+ / 0+ stat row under THE VENDING ACCELERATOR PROGRAM

suggested_fix.current: 0+ ENTREPRENEURS LAUNCHED / $0M+ SNACK/DRINK SALES / 0+ VENDING LOCATIONS
suggested_fix.proposed: Populate the counters with real figures (e.g. "500+ entrepreneurs launched", "$12M+ sales", "2,000+ locations"); if the data can't load, hide the stat block entirely rather than showing zeros

finding: The pages list has no row-level delete/duplicate/bulk actions; the '⋮' actions menu did not expose Archive/Delete and there is no multi-select.

evidence.quote: columnheader "Actions"

suggested_fix.current: '⋮' row menu with no visible Delete/Duplicate; no bulk select
suggested_fix.proposed: Expose Edit / Duplicate / Archive / Delete in the row menu and add checkbox multi-select with bulk archive/delete

finding: The contact page offers only a web form — no phone number, no email address, no chat, and no alternative channel.

evidence.quote:
Name*
(required)
Email*
(required)
Phone
City
State
...
Message*
(required)
SEND MESSAGE

suggested_fix.proposed: Add a support email and/or phone number prominently on the contact page alongside the form

finding: The navigation item and route say 'NEWS' but the page heading is 'BLOG', and article breadcrumbs also say 'BLOG' — the same section has two different names.

evidence.quote: BLOG

suggested_fix.current: Nav says 'NEWS', page heading and breadcrumb say 'BLOG'
suggested_fix.proposed: Use one name everywhere — change the page heading and breadcrumb to 'News' to match the nav item and the /news route

finding: There is no Contact link in the top navigation; the only way to reach /contact is the small footer link or knowing the URL.

evidence.quote:
ABOUT
RESOURCES
CASE STUDIES
NEWS
STEP INSIDE

suggested_fix.current: Top nav: About, Resources, Case Studies, News (no Contact)
suggested_fix.proposed: Add a 'Contact' link to the top navigation

finding: Form errors rely solely on native browser bubbles ('Please fill out this field.') with no programmatic error summary and no in-page, persistent, screen-reader-announced error list. The exploration log records 'no visible validation errors after empty submit' for the custom layer.

evidence.quote: native tooltip 'Please fill out this field.' anchored to a hidden upper field
empty: no visible validation errors after empty submit

suggested_fix.current: Native-only required validation, transient bubbles, no error summary
suggested_fix.proposed: Add aria-invalid + aria-describedby per field with persistent inline messages, and an aria-live='assertive' error summary at the top of the form listing each failed field with anchor links

finding: Above the fold on /news the article cards render as empty outlined boxes before any scrolling — the cards are scroll-reveal animated and paint blank until scrolled into view. First paint of the listing page looks broken/unfinished.

evidence.quote: three empty card outlines below the BLOG heading at first paint
article cards are scroll-reveal animated — they render as BLANK card outlines until scrolled into view

suggested_fix.current: Article cards are hidden (opacity 0) until scrolled into view, so above-fold cards stay blank
suggested_fix.proposed: Trigger the reveal for in-viewport cards on load, or render content visible by default and use the animation only as enhancement (and honour prefers-reduced-motion)

finding: A news article thumbnail fails to load with a 500 from the Next.js image optimizer; the card falls back to showing raw alt text instead of an image, and a server 500 is logged in the console.

evidence.quote: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 500 (Internal Server Error)
500 /_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.prod.website-files.com%2F...png&w=640&q=75
third card shows broken-image placeholder with literal alt text 'Top 10 Profitable Products to Stock in Your Vending Machine (Snacks, Healthy Items, Niche Products)'

suggested_fix.current: next/image proxy returns 500 for the cdn.prod.website-files.com source; card renders broken with alt text
suggested_fix.proposed: Whitelist the CDN host in next.config images.remotePatterns (or migrate the asset into managed media), and add an onError/fallback image so a failed thumbnail degrades gracefully

finding: On first open of the page editor a 'Quick Tour' overlay sits on top of the outline panel it points at and blocks interaction until dismissed.

evidence.quote: a "Quick Tour" overlay (Step 1 of 3) covers the outline panel and blocks interaction until dismissed

suggested_fix.current: Quick Tour overlay obscures the panel/button it references
suggested_fix.proposed: Position the tour tooltip beside (not over) its target, and let the user dismiss or skip the whole tour with one obvious button

finding: The Redirects manager is an orphan route with zero inbound links from any explored admin page.

evidence.quote: Back to pages

suggested_fix.proposed: Link 'Redirects' from the SEO pages screen header and/or the studio sidebar
